subcodes.first_line: We have wafted unto thee a breath of holiness from this Garment which hath been crimsoned with the blood of Bahá through that which was wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا الیک نفحه التقدیس من هذا القمیص الذی صار محمرا بدم البهاء بما اکتسبت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the concourse on high, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
